tree.name: Brandon Clarke
tree.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Darius Bazley and a 2024 2nd round pick (Bobi Klintman) to Oklahoma City for Brandon Clarke
tree.note: Gonzaga forward, drafted 21st overall by OKC, acquired via trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Darius Bazley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Memphis traded Mike Conley to Utah for Grayson Allen, Darius Bazley, Jae Crowder, Kyle Korver and a 2022 1st round pick (Walker Kessler)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Utah as part of Mike Conley trade package, immediately sent to OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: Mike Conley
assetsGivenUp.note: Ohio State guard, drafted 4th overall by Memphis in 2007

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Memphis' own 2024 second-round pick, conveyed to OKC
